sentences.english: Time to · dust off your old skills.
sentences.russian: Пора · стряхнуть пыль со старых навыков.

sentences.english: I can't · figure out what he wants.
sentences.russian: Я не могу · разобраться, чего он хочет.

sentences.english: I need to · catch up on sleep.
She · told him off in front of everyone.
Stop · faffing about and decide already.
Her positive attitude · rubs off on everyone.
Time really · goes by fast.
We had to · cut back on spending.
Don't · let me down this time.
sentences.russian: На этот раз не · подводи меня.

sentences.english: We need to · sort this out today.
sentences.russian: Нам нужно · разобраться с этим сегодня.

sentences.english: I · look forward to the weekend.
All that hard work · paid off.
He · turned out to be right.
Something · came up at the last minute.
She · insisted on paying for dinner.
sentences.russian: Она · настояла на том, чтобы заплатить.

sentences.english: I · take back what I said earlier.
sentences.russian: Я · беру назад то, что сказал.

sentences.english: She · turned in her assignment on time.
He just · brushed off all the criticism.
sentences.russian: Он просто · отмахнулся от всей критики.

sentences.english: · Cheer up — it could be worse.
This song · grows on you over time.
sentences.russian: Эта песня · начинает нравиться со временем.

sentences.english: He · dusted off his old guitar.
sentences.russian: Он · стряхнул пыль со своей старой гитары.

sentences.english: We'll · figure it out as we go.
She · caught up on all her work.
He got · told off by the boss.
We · faffed about all morning.
His confidence started to · rub off on me.
Three years · went by without any contact.
sentences.russian: Три года · прошло без какой-либо связи.

sentences.english: The company · cut back on staff last year.
sentences.russian: Компания · сократила персонал в прошлом году.

sentences.english: They · let me down completely.
Can you · sort out the schedule?
She's · looking forward to the trip.
Did the investment · pay off?
It all · turned out better than expected.
A great opportunity · came up yesterday.
He · insists on doing everything himself.
sentences.russian: Он · настаивает на том, чтобы делать всё сам.

sentences.english: You should · take back that comment.
sentences.russian: Тебе стоит · взять назад тот комментарий.

sentences.english: Did everyone · turn in their reports?
She · brushed off my concerns completely.
sentences.russian: Она полностью · отмахнулась от моих опасений.

sentences.english: She · cheered up after talking to him.
sentences.russian: Она · приободрилась после разговора с ним.

sentences.english: He · grew on me after a while.
sentences.russian: Он · начал нравиться мне через некоторое время.
